home blog about

Blog

This is my blog. It's a simple blog. There are many like it, but this one is mine.

Mostly this space acts as a random dumping ground for assorted thoughts of varying degrees of coherency. Make of it what you will.

  • 2021-01-25: Bitwise Basics — Fundamentally what you need to know
  • 2020-10-03: Object Oriented Programming: An Introduction — An introduction to OO
  • 2020-09-10: Undefined Behavior, to make a short story long — Language Lawyering for newbies
  • 2020-08-14: I sell out — A quick update about how I'm begging you for money (/s)
  • 2020-08-12: Vulkan From Zero: Part 1 — An overview of something I know very little about.
  • 2020-08-05: Aesthetics, Pain, and You — Making this website look good hurt.
  • 2020-08-04: Hello world! — In which the adventure begins. Or whatever.
